headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -69.7)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 90% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 140 quotes and 106 at strong intensity - people are expressing anger very forcefully today.
• The frustration score of 44.8 sits in the middle of its 138-day range, indicating moderate but not extreme levels.
• Optimism remains deeply negative at -47.6, though it improved slightly from yesterday's low.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
